en: I gotta tell you, I have been thinking all day about that scene you did. I mean, you were amazing.
ko: 솔직히, 네가 했던 그 장면에 대해 하루 종일 생각했어. 정말 대단했어.

en: Oh, you know, the writing was good. And the director's good. And my co-star's good.
ko: 아, 대본이 좋았고, 감독도 좋았고, 상대 배우도 좋았어.

en: But they're not as good as me!
